final_choice.row_label: Total, Per Aarsleff Holding A/S shareholders

variables.notes: Candidate list misses the best BE line. Selected 'Total, Per Aarsleff Holding A/S shareholders' from the balance sheet because it represents equity attributable to parent shareholders and excludes minority interests, which avoids double counting with MIB. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Total, Per Aarsleff Holding A/S shareholders
